summary: Frontend testing completed for 5 bug fixes/features. All tests PASSED: 1) Homepage loads without syntax errors, 2) Top Destinations shows 10 countries for March, 3) Visa map colors match legend exactly, 4) Visa tooltip shows correct visa type on hover, 5) Search functionality works correctly.
passed_tests: Homepage loads without errors (Seasons.js syntax error FIXED)
Top Destinations section displays 10 countries for March (#1-#10: Japan, India, Egypt, Morocco, Peru, Thailand, United States, Jordan, Spain, Costa Rica)
Visa page map is color-coded with colors matching the legend exactly
Legend colors verified from DOM: visa_free=#22C55E (Green), visa_on_arrival=#E25A53 (Red), e_visa=#4B89AC (Light Blue), visa_required=#F2A900 (Yellow), no_data=#D6D6D6 (Grey)
WorldMap.js visa colors (lines 132-140) match Visa.js legend colors (lines 35-41)
Visa map tooltip shows correct visa type when hovering (e.g., 'China - VISA REQUIRED', 'Russia - E VISA')
Homepage search functionality works - searching for 'Japan' shows country in dropdown
Search results display with 'Best Time' indicator for March destinations
critical_code_review_comments: Seasons.js syntax error at line 259 has been successfully fixed - no orphaned data objects
topDestinationsData properly contains 10 destinations for all 12 months
WorldMap.js visa mode colors correctly updated to match Visa.js legend colors
Color consistency verified: visa_free=#22C55E, visa_on_arrival=#E25A53, e_visa=#4B89AC, visa_required=#F2A900
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested fixes verified working: 1) Seasons.js syntax error fixed, 2) March has 10 destinations in topDestinationsData, 3) Visa map colors now match legend (Green=Visa Free, Red=Visa on Arrival, Light Blue=E-Visa, Yellow=Visa Required).

syntax_error_fix.description: Orphaned data objects at line 259 removed
